race.comment: TOO DARN STORMY (9) was solid first-up from midfield, finishing 0.7L away as favourite over 1100m. Up in trip today is a big tick and her recent trial was good at Belmont. Here on the fresh side and she can get back to winning ways in what looks a suitable race. FIRST BEACH (5) resumes today after bolting in at the trials recently at Belmont. He bumped into Smooth Chino to end last campaign and wasn't disgraced behind him. He's got a good fresh record and he creates plenty of interest here off his latest trial. PUBLICISE (13) was too good here 10 days ago and looks right up to this grade. Brad Parnham hops on board today and she drops in weight for the rise in grade. Maps well here and is not to be discounted. URQUHARTS BLUFF (3) can repeat the dose without surprising.
